message:
fix: replace blind PGID kill with verified group member enumeration (gt-2dp2i)

KillSessionWithProcesses, KillPaneProcesses, and KillSessionWithProcessesExcluding
used syscall.Kill(-pgid, ...) or enumerated all process group members blindly,
which could kill unrelated processes sharing the same PGID. Now we enumerate
group members and only kill those verified as belonging to our process tree
(descendants) or reparented to init (PPID == 1, indicating they were likely
our children that outlived their parent).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
